content.text: I'll deploy the CockroachDB cluster. Let me first check the current state.

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset,service,pods,pvc 2>&1; echo "---SA---"; kubectl -n cockroachdb get sa,role,rolebinding 2>&1; echo "---SC---"; kubectl get storageclass 2>&1

content.text: I'll use the `crdb-cluster-sa` service account. Now let me create the manifests.

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  publishNotReadyAddresses: true
  ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 26257
    targetPort: 26257
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: crdb-cluster
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-public
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 26257
    targetPort: 26257
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: crdb-cluster
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-pdb
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: crdb-cluster
  maxUnavailable: 1
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: crdb-cluster
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app: crdb-cluster
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: cockroachdb
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v23.2.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        ports:
        - name: grpc
          containerPort: 26257
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 2
        volumeMounts:
        - name: datadir
          mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -ecx
        - exec /cockroach/cockroach start
          --logtostderr
          --insecure
          --advertise-host=$(hostname).crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local
          --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080
          --cache=25%
          --max-sql-memory=25%
          --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  updateStrategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: datadir
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi

input.command:
cat > /tmp/crdb.yaml <<'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  publishNotReadyAddresses: true
  ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 26257
    targetPort: 26257
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: crdb-cluster
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-public
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 26257
    targetPort: 26257
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: crdb-cluster
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-pdb
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: crdb-cluster
  maxUnavailable: 1
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app: crdb-cluster
spec:
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: crdb-cluster
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app: crdb-cluster
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: cockroachdb
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v23.2.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        ports:
        - name: grpc
          containerPort: 26257
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 2
        volumeMounts:
        - name: datadir
          mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -ecx
        - exec /cockroach/cockroach start
          --logtostderr
          --insecure
          --advertise-host=$(hostname).crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local
          --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080
          --cache=25%
          --max-sql-memory=25%
          --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  updateStrategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: datadir
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
EOF
kubectl apply -f /tmp/crdb.yaml 2>&1

content.content:
service/crdb-cluster created
service/crdb-cluster-public created
poddisruptionbudget.policy/crdb-cluster-pdb created
statefulset.apps/crdb-cluster created

service/crdb-cluster created
service/crdb-cluster-public created
poddisruptionbudget.policy/crdb-cluster-pdb created
statefulset.apps/crdb-cluster created

content.text: Now I need to wait for pods to start, then initialize the cluster (a fresh CockroachDB cluster needs `cockroach init`).

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  running=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -l app=crdb-cluster --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running)
  echo "attempt $i: $running running"
  if [ "$running" -ge 3 ]; then break; fi
  sleep 5
done
kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods
input.description: Wait for crdb pods to reach Running

description: Wait for crdb pods to reach Running

summary: Wait for crdb pods to reach Running

content.text: Pods are Running (0/1 ready, as expected before init). Now initialize the cluster:

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  ready=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -l app=crdb-cluster --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep -c "1/1")
  echo "attempt $i: $ready ready"
  if [ "$ready" -ge 3 ]; then break; fi
  sleep 5
done
echo "=== final ==="
kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset,service
echo
kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods
echo
kubectl -n cockroachdb get pvc
echo
kubectl -n cockroachdb get pdb
input.description: Wait for pods ready and show final state

description: Wait for pods ready and show final state
